archimate:DataObject.name: Linked Open Vocabularies (LOV)
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Description: Ontology Engineer IngGroup
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
Publisher: Linked Open Vocabularies (LOV) is a comprehensive and curated collection of vocabularies or ontologies that are openly available on the web and interconnected through semantic links. LOV serves as a resource for the Semantic Web community, providing a repository of vocabularies that can be used to describe and annotate data in a standardized and interoperable manner.
Source: https://lov.linkeddata.es/dataset/lov/
LOST view: SV-Agnostic Ontology Catalogue
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/LinkedOpenVocabulariesDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/LinkedOpenVocabulariesDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/OntologiesCatalogueDataObject

properties.value: Linked Open Vocabularies (LOV) is a comprehensive and curated collection of vocabularies or ontologies that are openly available on the web and interconnected through semantic links. LOV serves as a resource for the Semantic Web community, providing a repository of vocabularies that can be used to describe and annotate data in a standardized and interoperable manner.
